HomeAboutResearchPublicationsProjectsTeachingAAAContact

Teaching

Courses and academic instruction.

Undergraduate

CENG 2XX · English / Turkish

Data Science Fundamentals

An introduction to data acquisition, preparation, exploratory analysis, and foundational data-driven thinking.

Topics

data preparation · exploratory analysis · visualization

CENG 4XX · English / Turkish

Data Science

Methods for analysing data and building reproducible analytical workflows for practical problems.

Topics

data analytics · predictive modelling · evaluation

CENG 4XY · English / Turkish

Data Classification and Clustering Techniques

A study of supervised classification and unsupervised clustering techniques for structured data.

Topics

classification · clustering · feature engineering

CENG 3XY · Turkish

Entrepreneurship

Foundations of innovation, technology entrepreneurship, and the development of value propositions.

Topics

innovation · business models · technology ventures

CENG 1XX · English / Turkish

Introduction to Computer Science

An introductory overview of computational thinking, algorithms, programming, and computer systems.

Topics

algorithms · programming · computer systems

Graduate

CENG 5XX · English

Metaheuristic Optimization

Nature-inspired optimization methods and their research applications.

Topics

global optimization · AAA · benchmarking

PhD

CENG 6XX · English

Advanced Machine Learning Research

Research-focused study of advanced machine learning methods and experimental design.

Topics

deep learning · research methods · reproducibility
